Introduction
    Two rival chefs, a Cantonese cook and a Michelin-starred French chef, compete in a culinary competition but unexpectedly team up against a common adversary, blending their culinary styles in a fusion of Eastern and Western cuisine.

Production companies: Beijing Asian Union Culture & Media Investment
